Package de.jvstvshd.necrify.velocity.impl

Class DefaultPlayerResolver

java.lang.Object
de.jvstvshd.necrify.velocity.impl.DefaultPlayerResolver
All Implemented Interfaces:
PlayerResolver
@Deprecated(since="1.2.0", forRemoval=true) @ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion="2.0.0") public class DefaultPlayerResolver extends Object implements PlayerResolver
Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<String>
    getOrQueryPlayerName(@NotNull UUID uuid, @NotNull Executor executor)
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    At first, PlayerResolver.getPlayerName(UUID) is invoked.
    CompletableFuture<UUID>
    getOrQueryPlayerUuid(@NotNull String name, @NotNull Executor executor)
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    At first, PlayerResolver.getPlayerUuid(String) is invoked.
    Optional<String>
    getPlayerName(@NotNull UUID uuid)
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Retrieves the player's name via com.velocitypowered.api.proxy.ProxyServer#getPlayer(UUID) (on Velocity), a caching mechanism or related things.
    Optional<UUID>
    getPlayerUuid(@NotNull String name)
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Retrieves the player's uuid via com.velocitypowered.api.proxy.ProxyServer#getPlayer(String) (on velocity), a caching mechanism or related things.
    CompletableFuture<String>
    queryPlayerName(@NotNull UUID uuid, @NotNull Executor executor)
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Queries the player's name, for example through the Mojang API
    CompletableFuture<UUID>
    queryPlayerUuid(@NotNull String name, @NotNull Executor executor)
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Queries the player's uuid, for example through the Mojang API

  • Method Details

    • getPlayerName

      public Optional<String> getPlayerName(@NotNull @NotNull UUID uuid)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      Description copied from interface: PlayerResolver
      Retrieves the player's name via com.velocitypowered.api.proxy.ProxyServer#getPlayer(UUID) (on Velocity), a caching mechanism or related things.
      Specified by:
      getPlayerName in interface PlayerResolver
      Parameters:
      uuid - the uuid of the player
      Returns:
      the name, or Optional.empty()

    • queryPlayerName

      public CompletableFuture<String> queryPlayerName(@NotNull @NotNull UUID uuid, @NotNull @NotNull Executor executor)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      Description copied from interface: PlayerResolver
      Queries the player's name, for example through the Mojang API
      Specified by:
      queryPlayerName in interface PlayerResolver
      Parameters:
      uuid - the uuid of the player
      executor - an executor to compute async operations
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture being completed with the player's name or null, if not found.

    • getOrQueryPlayerName

      public CompletableFuture<String> getOrQueryPlayerName(@NotNull @NotNull UUID uuid, @NotNull @NotNull Executor executor)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      Description copied from interface: PlayerResolver
      At first, PlayerResolver.getPlayerName(UUID) is invoked. If the result is empty, the result of PlayerResolver.queryPlayerName(UUID, Executor) will be returned.
      Specified by:
      getOrQueryPlayerName in interface PlayerResolver
      Parameters:
      uuid - the uuid of the player
      executor - an executor to compute async operations
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture being completed with the player's name or null, if not found.

      public Optional<UUID> getPlayerUuid(@NotNull @NotNull String name)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      Description copied from interface: PlayerResolver
      Retrieves the player's uuid via com.velocitypowered.api.proxy.ProxyServer#getPlayer(String) (on velocity), a caching mechanism or related things.
      Specified by:
      getPlayerUuid in interface PlayerResolver
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the player
      Returns:
      the name, or Optional.empty()

      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.

      Queries the player's uuid, for example through the Mojang API

    • getOrQueryPlayerUuid

      public CompletableFuture<UUID> getOrQueryPlayerUuid(@NotNull @NotNull String name, @NotNull @NotNull Executor executor)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      Description copied from interface: PlayerResolver
      At first, PlayerResolver.getPlayerUuid(String) is invoked. If the result is empty, the result of PlayerResolver.queryPlayerUuid(String, Executor) will be returned.
      Specified by:
      getOrQueryPlayerUuid in interface PlayerResolver
      Parameters:
      name - the uuid of the player
      executor - an executor to compute async operations
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture being completed with the player's name or null, if not found.
